parameters.query: UPDATE reports SET status='approved', approved_by='{{ $json.approved_by }}', approved_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.report_id }}' RETURNING id, status;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, report_id: $json.id, status: 'approved', message: 'Report approved. Ready for delivery.' }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT e.id, e.name as engagement_name, e.type, e.testing_window_start, e.testing_window_end,
       c.name as client_name, c.contact_name, c.contact_email,
       em.total_assets, em.assets_tested, em.total_findings, em.validated_findings, em.coverage_pct
FROM engagements e
JOIN clients c ON e.client_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN engagement_metrics em ON em.engagement_id = e.id
WHERE e.id = '{{ $json.engagement_id }}';

SELECT nf.id, nf.title, nf.severity, nf.recon_score, nf.priority_bucket,
       nf.category, nf.cwe_id, nf.owasp_category, nf.validation_status,
       nf.business_impact, nf.remediation_guidance, nf.evidence_summary,
       nf.score_explanation, nf.analyst_notes, nf.is_recurring, nf.references,
       nf.first_seen, nf.last_seen,
       a.asset_value, a.asset_type, a.environment
FROM normalized_findings nf
JOIN assets a ON nf.asset_id = a.id
WHERE nf.engagement_id = '{{ $('Normalize Request').first().json.engagement_id }}'
  AND nf.validation_status IN ('validated','analyst_reviewed')
  AND nf.priority_bucket != 'likely_false_positive'
ORDER BY nf.recon_score DESC;

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '📋 *RECON OS Report Ready for Review*
Report ID: ' + $('Create Report Record').first().json.id + '
Findings: ' + $('Assemble Report').first().json.finding_count + '
Approve: POST /webhook/recon-os/reports/approve
{"report_id":"' + $('Create Report Record').first().json.id + '","approved_by":"your_name"}', username: 'RECON OS' }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, report_id: $('Create Report Record').first().json.id, finding_count: $('Assemble Report').first().json.finding_count, status: 'draft', message: 'Report draft created. Awaiting analyst approval at POST /webhook/recon-os/reports/approve' }) }}

meta.description: RECON OS WF-12: Report Assembler — generates structured technical report from validated findings. Creates draft requiring analyst approval before delivery. POST /webhook/recon-os/reports/generate
